scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    TRIM(id_unidad) AS id_unidad,
    TRIM(id_brigada) AS id_brigada,
    TRIM(nombre) AS nombre,
    TRIM(codigo) AS codigo,
    TRIM(ciudad) AS ciudad,
    TRIM(departamento) AS departamento,
    TRIM(tipo_cuartel) AS tipo_cuartel
FROM bronze.unidades_raw',

departamento = case(     in(['santacruz','stacruz','scz','sc'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Santa Cruz',     in(['lapaz','lpz','lp'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'La Paz',     in(['cochabamba','cbba','cbb','cb'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Cochabamba',     in(['oruro','oru','or'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Oruro',     in(['potosi','potosí','pts','pt'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Potosí',     in(['tarija','tja','tj'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Tarija',     in(['chuquisaca','chq','sucre','suc','ch'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Chuquisaca',     in(['beni','ben','bn'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Beni',     in(['pando','pnd','pn'], lower(regexReplace(departamento, '[^a-zA-Z]', ''))), 'Pando',     initCap(trim(departamento)) ),
